response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong general software engineering skills and seniority exceeding the role level, they critically lack three mandatory requirements: only ~6 months of documented C++ experience versus the required 5-10 years of hands-on development, no SQL Server or Oracle experience (generic SQL skills with MongoDB background), and zero domain expertise in capital markets, fixed income, investment banking, or financial services—which is explicitly required.
strengths: Senior-level experience with 14+ years demonstrating architectural thinking and team leadership
Strong CI/CD and DevOps infrastructure expertise established across multiple roles
Excellent communication and teaching abilities evidenced by public workshops and open-source contributions
concerns: Only ~6 months of documented C++ experience at National Instruments (2014-2015) versus mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on development
Career background is web/mobile/polyglot development with MongoDB NoSQL focus; no SQL Server or Oracle experience evident
Entirely absent domain expertise in capital markets, fixed income, investment banking, or financial services

key_factors.factor: Capital markets or financial services domain expertise
